meaning: n.<古>乡下人,老粗 Carl 卡尔(男子名)
examples: Carl sits at a computer terminal 40 hours a week.
I haven't a clue what I'll give Carl for his birthday next year.
Her career began as prima donna with the Royal Carl Rosa Opera Company.
The letters released on Thursday were sent to powerful US senators John McCain and Carl Levin.
And he needed to figure out how to split up Motorola to placate shareholders like Carl Icahn.
